full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #32 (2026-05-15)

PULSE
Health: 0.5464 (C). 935 wallets, 194 contributors. 88 memos today vs 160 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
65 reward payments, 498069 PFT distributed to 30 contributors. Top earner: rMA69k...rcQK (125829 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued today totaling 8,500 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (69,300 PFT, avg 8,662/day over 8 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rMA69k...rcQK (112 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (28.0 memos/day in 4 days). 25 new wallet(s) this week. 33 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 78.4%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-15): 160 transactions from 25 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
